member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Manifest
member.summary:
A versioned, auditable bundle that describes the structure and locations of course content (courses, learning activities) for an organization's training needs.
Manifests follow a strict lifecycle: → → . Once published, a manifest is immutable — content changes require a new version. This ensures learners mid-session always see a consistent snapshot of their content.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Manifest.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for this manifest.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Manifest.OrganizationId
member.summary: Gets or sets the ID of the organization this manifest belongs to.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Manifest.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name of the manifest.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Manifest.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional human-readable description of what this manifest covers.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Manifest.Version
member.summary: Gets or sets the semantic version string (e.g., "1.2.0"). Versions are assigned at publish time and are unique per organization.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Manifest.Status
member.summary: Gets or sets the current lifecycle status of the manifest.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Manifest.Content
member.summary: Gets or sets the course content as a JSON string. The JSON structure describes courses and their nested learning activities. Stored as a blob to avoid complex joins when the training app fetches the full manifest.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Manifest.PublishedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when this manifest was published, or null if it is still a draft. Set once and never updated after publishing.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Manifest.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when this manifest was created.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Manifest.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp of the most recent update.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Manifest.Organization
member.summary: Navigation property to the owning organization.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Manifest.CreateDraft(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new manifest in status. All manifests must start as drafts; they cannot be created in a published state.
member.param: The ID of the owning organization.
Display name — must not be blank.
Optional description.
Optional initial JSON content; defaults to an empty object.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Manifest.Publish(System.String)
member.summary: Transitions this manifest from to and stamps . After this call the manifest is immutable — no further content changes are allowed; new edits must be made on a new manifest version.
member.param: The semantic version string to assign (e.g., "1.0.0").
member.exception: Thrown if the manifest is already published.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Manifest.Archive
member.summary: Transitions this manifest to . Archiving happens automatically when a newer manifest is published for the same organization. Archived manifests are retained so in-flight learner sessions can still reference them.
member.exception: Thrown if the manifest is already archived.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization
member.summary: Represents a hospital, department, or training centre that can be provisioned and configured through the Laerdal Implementer. Organizations form a parent-child hierarchy via ; a null parent means a root-level organization.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for this organization.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization.ParentId
member.summary: Gets or sets the ID of the parent organization, or null if this is a root org.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name of the organization.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization.Code
member.summary: Gets or sets the short identifier code. Unique within the same parent scope. Stored in uppercase.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this is a hospital, department, or training centre.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization.ExternalId
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional reference to an identity in an external system (e.g., an OIDC directory or enterprise HR system).

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization.IsActive
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the organization is active. Inactive organizations are soft-deleted — they remain in the database to preserve audit trails and foreign key relationships with manifests.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when this organization was created.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp of the most recent update.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization.Parent
member.summary: Navigation property to the parent organization, if one exists.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization.Children
member.summary: Navigation property to all direct child organizations.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization.Manifests
member.summary: Navigation property to all manifests owned by this organization.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization.Create(System.String,System.String,LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Enums.OrganizationType,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new, active organization after validating the required fields. Using a factory method rather than a public constructor ensures the entity is always constructed in a valid state.
member.param: Display name — must not be blank.
Short identifier code — must not be blank; stored as uppercase.
The kind of organization.
ID of the parent org, or null for a root organization.
Optional reference to an external identity system.
member.exception: Thrown when name or code is empty.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization.Update(System.String,LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Enums.OrganizationType,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Updates mutable fields on an existing organization and stamps .
member.param: New display name — must not be blank.
New organization type.
Whether the organization should remain active.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization.CanBeDeleted
member.summary: Checks whether this organization can be safely removed. A parent org cannot be deleted while it still has active children, because that would orphan them.
member.returns: true if there are no active child organizations; otherwise false.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Enums.ManifestStatus
member.summary: Represents the lifecycle stage of a . Transitions flow in one direction only: Draft → Published → Archived. Stored as an integer in the database (0, 1, 2).

member.name: F:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Enums.ManifestStatus.Draft
member.summary: The manifest is being edited and has not yet been released to learners. Draft manifests can be freely modified or deleted.

member.name: F:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Enums.ManifestStatus.Published
member.summary: The manifest has been released. Its content is immutable — any edits require creating a new manifest version. Only one manifest per organization may be in this state at a time.

member.name: F:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Enums.ManifestStatus.Archived
member.summary: The manifest was previously published but has since been superseded by a newer version. Archived manifests are retained so that in-flight learner sessions can still reference their pinned snapshot.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Enums.OrganizationType
member.summary: Classifies the kind of organization. Stored as an integer in the database (0, 1, 2) to avoid magic numbers in queries and application code.

member.name: F:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Enums.OrganizationType.Hospital
member.summary: A top-level hospital or healthcare institution.

member.name: F:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Enums.OrganizationType.Department
member.summary: A department or sub-unit within a hospital.

member.name: F:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Enums.OrganizationType.TrainingCenter
member.summary: A dedicated training centre, which may span multiple departments.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IManifestRepository
member.summary: Defines persistence operations for entities. Lives in the Domain layer so the Application layer stays decoupled from any specific storage technology. The EF Core implementation is in Infrastructure.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IManifestRepository.AddAsync(LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Manifest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists a new manifest and returns the saved entity.
member.param: The manifest to insert.
Propagates cancellation from the HTTP request.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IManifestRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a single manifest by its ID, including its owning organization, or null if no match is found.
member.param: The manifest's primary key.
Propagates cancellation from the HTTP request.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IManifestRepository.GetPublishedByOrganizationAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the single manifest for the given organization, or null if none exists. Used by the training app to fetch the active content snapshot before starting a learner session.
member.param: The owning organization's ID.
Propagates cancellation from the HTTP request.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IManifestRepository.GetByOrganizationIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all manifests (all statuses) for the given organization.
member.param: The owning organization's ID.
Propagates cancellation from the HTTP request.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IManifestRepository.GetByOrganizationIdAndStatusAsync(System.Guid,LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Enums.ManifestStatus,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns manifests for the given organization filtered to a specific status. Useful for listing only drafts or only archived versions.
member.param: The owning organization's ID.
The lifecycle stage to filter by.
Propagates cancellation from the HTTP request.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IManifestRepository.UpdateAsync(LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Manifest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists changes to an existing manifest and returns the updated entity. Used when archiving a previously published manifest or promoting a draft.
member.param: The manifest with updated field values.
Propagates cancellation from the HTTP request.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IOrganizationRepository
member.summary: Defines persistence operations for entities. The interface lives in the Domain layer so that the Application layer can depend on the abstraction rather than on any specific database technology. The concrete implementation (EF Core / SQL Server) lives in the Infrastructure layer.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IOrganizationRepository.AddAsync(LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists a new organization and returns the saved entity.
member.param: The organization to insert.
Propagates cancellation from the HTTP request.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IOrganizationRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a single organization by its ID, including its parent and direct children, or null if no match is found.
member.param: The organization's primary key.
Propagates cancellation from the HTTP request.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IOrganizationRepository.GetByCodeAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Finds an organization by code within a specific parent scope, or null if no match exists. Used to enforce the uniqueness business rule before inserting.
member.param: The short identifier code (case-sensitive after normalization).
The parent organization's ID, or null to search among root organizations.
Propagates cancellation from the HTTP request.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IOrganizationRepository.GetAllAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all organizations, each including their parent and direct children.
member.param: Propagates cancellation from the HTTP request.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IOrganizationRepository.GetByParentIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all direct children of the specified parent organization.
member.param: The parent organization's ID.
Propagates cancellation from the HTTP request.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IOrganizationRepository.UpdateAsync(LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Entities.Organization,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists changes to an existing organization and returns the updated entity.
member.param: The organization with updated field values.
Propagates cancellation from the HTTP request.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.Repositories.IOrganizationRepository.ExistsAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns true if an organization with the given ID exists; otherwise false. Cheaper than when only existence matters (e.g., parent validation).
member.param: The organization's primary key.
Propagates cancellation from the HTTP request.

member.name: T:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.ValueObjects.ManifestVersion
member.summary: Represents a semantic version (Major.Minor.Patch) for a manifest. Encapsulates the version bumping rules so callers can't construct an invalid version string and the logic is not scattered across handlers.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.ValueObjects.ManifestVersion.Major
member.summary: Breaking change — reset Minor and Patch to 0.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.ValueObjects.ManifestVersion.Minor
member.summary: Backwards-compatible new content — reset Patch to 0.

member.name: P:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.ValueObjects.ManifestVersion.Patch
member.summary: Small corrections that don't change the content structure.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.ValueObjects.ManifestVersion.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.param: Must be ≥ 0.
Must be ≥ 0.
Must be ≥ 0.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.ValueObjects.ManifestVersion.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a version string in the form "Major.Minor.Patch".

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.ValueObjects.ManifestVersion.BumpMajor
member.summary: Returns a new version with Major incremented and Minor/Patch reset to 0.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.ValueObjects.ManifestVersion.BumpMinor
member.summary: Returns a new version with Minor incremented and Patch reset to 0.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.ValueObjects.ManifestVersion.BumpPatch
member.summary: Returns a new version with only Patch incremented.

member.name: M:LaerdalImplementation.Domain.ValueObjects.ManifestVersion.ToString
member.summary: Returns the canonical "Major.Minor.Patch" string (e.g. "1.2.3").
